msContents.summary:
[p]Magical and astrological treatises[/p]
[p]Written by the same scribe throughout in a small upright hand, 26 lines to a page. A few headings and paragraph marks in red. There are some additional headings and marginalia by a slightly later hand. In the lower margin of f. 17v is a small pen-drawn horoscopic figure, and on ff. 18-20 numerical squares. [/p]
[p][b]Contents[/b][/p]
[p]1. f. 1r-2r Pseudo-Bede, [i]De situatione stellarum in 12 signis[/i][/p]
[p]f. 1r Incipit tractatus de situatione stellarum in 12 signis [Added: 'secundum Venerabilem Bedam'. At the side, by the later hand: 'De stellis pertinentibus 12 signis']. Aries habet in capite stellam unam ...[/p]
[p]2. ff. 2r-11v Pseudo-Bede, [i]De 12 signis et eorum occulitis virtutibus[/i][/p]
[p]f. 2r In nomine domini nostri ihesu christi. Incipit tractatus de 12 signis et eorum occultis uirtutibus editus a venerabili presbitero Beda ad Dalmachum missus discipulum suum qui fuir eruditor Karoli magni ... f. 11v ... Offerantur autem pro eis redimendis sacredoti qui ea consecraverit in honorie dei et 12. apostolorum. 12. denarii [added by the later hand: 'et supra predicta sigilla facias ut sacer[dos] dicar tres missas Spiritus sancti et et missas 12 apostolorum et tribuat ei angelum Sancti Joannis']. [Original hand] Anno. 1487. die 28. mensis Julii. conscriptus est liber iste per me Ro. bo. Scriptorem ferrariensem.[/p]
[p]ff. 12r-13v blank.[/p]
[p]3. ff. 14r-17r [i]Picatrix[/i], extract[/p]
[p]f. 14r Incipiunt secrreta elementorum secretorum ... [Added by the later hand: 'et sunt ymagines 12 signorum extracte secundum consilium sapientis Picatricis. In libro secundo multis curis reperta fuere']. De figura arietis ad infirmitates capitis. Aries forma eius recta sine lingua ... f. 17r ... vel mastix et fiat de die et non de nocte. Expliciunt imagines signorum contra infirmitates corporis hominis secundum consilium picatricis libro 2 et hoc die. 30. mensis. Julii 1487.[/p]
[p]4. ff. 17v-18v Anonymous, [i]De civitatibus et provinciis sub signis[/i][/p]
[p]f. 17v [By the later hand] de civitatibus et provinciis existentibus sub ... f. 18v ... quia multa sunt sue utilitates.[/p]
[p]5. ff. 18v-21r Anonymous, [i]De figuris planetarum[/i][/p]
[p]f. 18v Iste sunt figure 7 planetarum in quibus ... f. 21r ... adde a parte posteriori curati sunt.[/p]
[p]6. ff. 21v-23v Anonymous, [i]De imaginibus septem planetarum[/i][/p]
[p]f. 21v [By the later hand] De ymagnibus septem plantearum. Imago Iovis fit exeunte eo de cancro ... f. 23v ... et tardare faciunt cantiem si in die bis hoc pectinet. Explectus est libellus iste die 30 Julii 1487. ferrarie. per me Ro. bo scriptorem.[/p]

objectDesc.supportDesc: 1 volume25 ff. (last 2 bl.). 4to. 21 x 15 cm. Modern quarter calf binding.

binding.p: 25 ff. (last 2 bl.). 4to. 21 x 15 cm. Modern quarter calf binding.

bibl.title: Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library
bibl.author: S. A. J. Moorat
bibl.publisher: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine

custodialHist.custEvent: Catalogue description modified in 2014. For original description, see S.A.J. Moorat, [i]Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library[/i] (London: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine, 1962-1973).

listBibl.bibl:
[p][b]Bibliography[/b][/p]
[p]Klaassen, Frank. 'Medieval Ritual Magic in the Renaissance', [i]Aries[/i] 3:2 (2003), p. 195.[/p]

revisionDesc.change: Transformed Calm xml export to TEI xml file using a transformation scenario
Manual edits following automated Calm-TEI transformation
